# Scope Boundaries

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providermigrationdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Public Migration Status](../public-migration-status.md)

RIID-4651 moved internal/agentbridge into public riido-daemon.

The root is stdlib-only and provider-neutral: Adapter, RawEvent / Parser, RunState, reducer, telemetry parser, and tool start gate.

Facts:

- Task DB, project, MWSD, local API, server, control-plane, infra, secrets, and state files were not included in this slice.
- Figma onboarding planning screens remain outside C4 ownership.
- C4 may report runtime detection and liveness, then execute SaaS-authorized assignments, but it does not own UI labels, fixture catalog, direct-setting forms, workspace selectors, or preview popovers.
- Node 432:46849 may collect agent draft/configuration before runtime and workspace selection; C4 consumes only final authorized runtime/model/instruction snapshots.
- Web onboarding node 236:29749 is outside C4; download CTA may lead to daemon artifact execution, but sign-up, terms, invite, waitlist, marketing consent, and progress references remain upstream.

Evidence artifacts:

- internal/agentbridge
- docs/30-architecture/figma-ai-agent-daemon-boundary.md
